data.string: Pokémon Dream World is currently busy. Please try again later!
Welcome to the Pokémon Dream World.
You can play in the Pokémon DW for one hour.

You can only play for an hour in the Pokémon Dream World, then it stops automatically. It's a good idea to stop playing and save your data when asked, so you can be sure your data gets saved properly.
Processing your data for the Pokémon Dream World. Please wait before trying again. It may take five minutes or longer to complete the process.
*It may take a while for a Pokémon to start dreaming after you tuck in the Pokémon with Game Sync.
Your time in the Pokémon Dream World is about to end.
Exit and prepare to wake up
Prepare to exit the Pokémon DW and use Game Sync to wake up your Pokémon. You can check the Pokémon and items you're sending to your Entralink.
Exit the Pokémon DW and wake up
Exit the Pokémon DW without waking
Choose this option to exit the Pokémon DW temporarily.
If the Pokémon that you wished for at the Tree of Dreams is on the board, the rainbow to the Island of Dreams won't appear!
The Pokémon DW will automatically end one hour after you start playing.
Keep playing in the Pokémon DW
After using Game Sync to wake up your Pokémon, go to the Entree Forest to meet the Pokémon you took.
If there is another Pokémon you'd like to take, click "Back" and check the Friend Board in your home.
It may take some time for the Pokémon you wished for at the Tree of Dreams to appear on the Friend Board.
You have left the Pokémon Dream World.
A database error has occured. You have been disconnected.
